_readme: Ratchet baseline for the conformance sweep (conformance.test.mjs). Every method here returns -32603 (internal crash) on well-formed minimal input — each is a REAL handler bug awaiting triage, discovered on the sweep's first run (2026-07-24). Known failures are reported loudly but do not fail CI; any method NOT in this list that returns -32603 FAILS. When you fix one, the sweep logs 'FIXED — remove from baseline'; delete the entry (never let this list grow silently — that defeats the ratchet). Exemplar of the burn-down loop: encounters.get was here for ~10 minutes — its not-found path called Encounters.countAsync() (not a collection method) so the ERROR path itself crashed; fixed same-day.
certificates.fetch: unverified — needs triage (likely raw network/parse throw unmapped)
dataImporter.readXlsxArray: unverified — likely XLSX.read raw throw on garbage input, unmapped
dataImporter.readXlsxBinary: unverified — likely XLSX.read raw throw on garbage input, unmapped
questionnaireResponses.get: unverified — likely not-found/error path defect (cf. encounters.get)
questionnaires.get: unverified — likely not-found/error path defect (cf. encounters.get)
rag.getKnowledgeForPrompt: unverified — needs triage (LLM/RAG infra may be unconfigured; should map to feature-disabled)
researchStudies.get: unverified — likely not-found/error path defect (cf. encounters.get)
system.getInfo: unverified — needs triage (crashes with empty params)
udap.fetchWellKnown: unverified — FLAKY (appeared run 1, not run 2); likely network-dependent raw throw
udapCore.fetchWellKnown: unverified — likely raw fetch() throw on placeholder URL, unmapped
